DROP TABLE IF EXISTS dbo.dim_hint;

CREATE TABLE dbo.dim_hint
(
    hint_id INT NOT NULL,
    hint_stage INT NOT NULL,
    hint_priority INT NOT NULL,
    hint_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    hint_label VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    hint_description VARCHAR(500) NULL,
    hint_template VARCHAR(1000) NULL,
    hint_category VARCHAR(100) NULL,
    is_dynamic BIT NOT NULL,
    is_active BIT NOT NULL,
    source_table VARCHAR(100) NULL,
    source_field VARCHAR(100) NULL
);

TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.dim_hint;

INSERT INTO dbo.dim_hint (
    hint_id,
    hint_stage,
    hint_priority,
    hint_type,
    hint_label,
    hint_description,
    hint_template,
    hint_category,
    is_dynamic,
    is_active,
    source_table,
    source_field
)
VALUES
(15,1,1,'local_time','Local time','Indicates the current local time','The local time is {Local_time_live}.','time',1,1,'City_game_context','Timezone_offset_sec'),
(16,1,2,'weather_temp','Temperature','Indicates the current temperature','The current temperature is {Temperature}.','climate',1,1,'Weather_city_current','Temperature'),
(17,1,3,'weather_type','Weather','Indicates the current weather condition','Current weather conditions: {Weather_type}.','climate',1,1,'Weather_city_current','Weather_type'),

(2,2,4,'hemisphere','Hemisphere','Indicates the hemisphere of the city','The city is in the {Hemisphere}.','geography',0,1,'Dim_City','Hemisphere'),
(1,2,5,'continent','Continent','Indicates the continent of the city','The city is located in {Continent}.','geography',0,1,'Dim_Country','Continent'),

(22,3,6,'country_category','Country size','Indicates the overall size category of the country','The city is located in a {Country_category} country.','geography',0,1,'Dim_Country','Country_category'),
(7,3,7,'coastal_distance_category','Coastal proximity','Indicates whether the city is coastal or inland','The city is {Coastal_distance_category}.','geography',0,1,'Dim_City','Coastal_distance_category'),
(8,3,8,'altitude_category','Altitude category','Indicates the altitude category of the city','The city is at a {Altitude_category} altitude.','geography',0,1,'Dim_City','Altitude_category'),
(9,3,9,'city_category','City size','Indicates the size category of the city','This is a {City_category}.','demographic',0,1,'Dim_City','City_category'),
(19,3,18,'currency_name','Currency','Indicates the currency used in the country','The currency used is {Currency_name}.','country',0,1,'Dim_Country','Currency_name'),

(12,4,10,'country_density_category','Country density','Indicates the density of the country','The country has a {Country_density_category} population density.','demographic',0,1,'Dim_Country','Country_density_category'),
(6,4,11,'is_capital','Capital status','Indicates whether the city is a capital','This city is {Is_capital}.','political',0,1,'Dim_City','Is_capital'),
(13,4,12,'languages_count','Number of languages','Indicates the number of main languages in the country','The country has {Languages_count} main language(s).','demographic',0,1,'Dim_Country','Languages_count'),

(5,5,13,'country_name','Country','Indicates the country of the city','This city is located in {Country_name}.','geography',0,1,'Dim_Country','Country_name'),
(10,5,14,'city_name_length_category','Name length','Indicates the length category of the city name','The city name has a {City_name_length_category} length.','linguistic',0,1,'Dim_City','City_name_length_category'),
(11,5,15,'city_word_count_category','Word count','Indicates the number of words in the city name','The city name falls into the {City_word_count_category} category.','linguistic',0,1,'Dim_City','City_word_count_category'),
(14,5,16,'city_first_letter','First letter','Indicates the first letter of the city name','The city starts with the letter {City_first_letter}.','linguistic',0,1,'Dim_City','City_first_letter'),

(18,6,17,'city_last_letter','Last letter','Indicates the last letter of the city name','The city ends with the letter {City_last_letter}.','linguistic',0,1,'Dim_City','City_last_letter'),

(20,5,19,'relative_time_offset','UTC offset','Indicates the UTC offset of the city','The UTC offset is {Relative_time_offset}.','time',0,0,'City_game_context','Relative_time_offset'),
(21,5,20,'count_neighbours','Neighbours count','Indicates the number of neighbouring countries','The country has {Neighbours_count} neighbouring countries.','geography',0,0,'Dim_Country','Neighbours_count'),
(3,5,21,'global_quadrant','Global quadrant','Indicates the global quadrant of the city','The city is in the {Global_quadrant} quadrant.','geography',0,0,'Dim_City','Global_quadrant'),
(4,5,22,'longitudinal_zone','Longitudinal zone','Indicates a simplified longitudinal zone','The city belongs to the {Longitudinal_zone} longitudinal zone.','geography',0,0,'Dim_City','Longitudinal_zone');
